panes.name: pit-wall
panes.command: env PORT=3041 pnpm dev || (echo 'pit-wall dev unavailable; idle' && tail -f /dev/null)

panes.name: claude-headless
panes.command: node ${HOME}/ojfbot/core/scripts/hooks/bead-emit.mjs agent-create --role=worker --app=f1-pit-wall --session-id=launcher && echo '✓ f1-pit-wall-agent-worker registered' && tail -f /dev/null
